description: Apologies, sir — Edgelord stepped aside; Mr. Nodeley here. The four DSK signature mechanics needed completion at the symbol layer: rooms, eerie, and manifest-dread were already commissioned, and Survival was flagged as the fourth in the manifest-dread.md body. Corpus walk confirmed six enriched Survival-keyword-bearing anchors (well past the threshold), with Defiant Survivor dual-symbol-coding alongside manifest-dread as the canonical Survival-fires-Manifest-Dread case. I have written the node, wired all six anchors via symbols: ['survival'] frontmatter, and synced reciprocal related_symbols: [survival] on the dsk-survival-archetype character node. The graph now hosts the full DSK signature-suite at the symbol layer, with only Delirium uncommissioned (and Delirium is a returning-from-Innistrad mechanic, not a DSK-original — Mr. Nodeley flags it for separate consideration rather than commissioning here).
citations: [Wizards: Mark Rosewater, Top of the Duskmourning Part 1 & 2, 2024-09]
[MTG Wiki: Duskmourn: House of Horror, Themes and Mechanics, Survival section]
[Cabin in the Woods (2011, Whedon/Goddard) — designer-cited source material]
files_modified: cards/magic-the-gathering/duskmourn-house-of-horror/175-defiant-survivor.md (symbols frontmatter extended to dual: manifest-dread + survival)
cards/_characters/agency.md (related_symbols synced to include disguise, suspect)
cards/_characters/valgavoth.md (related_symbols synced to include rooms, eerie, manifest-dread, survival)
dual_symbol_note: Defiant Survivor (DSK-175) carries both manifest-dread AND survival in symbols frontmatter; this is the canonical case of a Survival trigger firing manifest dread, making the card the structural bridge between the two DSK signature-keyword nodes.
other_candidates_considered: Delirium symbol node — returning-from-Innistrad mechanic, not DSK-original; cross-set commission deferred until corpus accumulates ≥3 anchors with the keyword (currently 1: Fear of Burning Alive has a Delirium ride-along trigger; not the same as bearing the Delirium ability-word itself)
Improvised-weapon-Equipment as separate symbol node — declined; already hosted at dsk-survival-archetype character node as cohort axis, no symbol-layer commission needed
Acrobatic Cheerleader (DSK-1) and Veteran Survivor — candidate Survival anchors not yet in BBL corpus; will attach to this node automatically when they land via future Collectr CSV
